case_title: CURTIS W BERLIND VS. GEORGE DANOPOULOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE FOR BOTH DEFENDANTS TO SEP-04-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT GEORGE DANOPOULOS WAS SERVED WITH CLAIM BUT NOT DEFENDANT STAR PAINTING. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE CLERK THAT HE WAS GOING TO SERVE BOTH DEFENDANTS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-16-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-04-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
COPYING FEES (1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY DEFENDANT DANOPOULOS, GEORGE  CSLB LIC#376058 DANAPOULOS, GEORGE DBA STAR PAINTING CSLB LIC # 376058
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 125.00 - SERVED JUN-21-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DANOPOULOS, GEORGE  CSLB LIC#376058
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (GEORGE DANAPOULOS DBA STAR PAINTING) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERLIND, CURTIS W
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED SEP-10-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DANOPOULOS, GEORGE  CSLB LIC#376058
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2014 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DANOPOULOS, GEORGE  CSLB LIC#376058 DANAPOULOS, GEORGE DBA STAR PAINTING CSLB LIC # 376058

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERLIND, CURTIS W AS TO DEFENDANT DANOPOULOS, GEORGE  CSLB LIC#376058 DANAPOULOS, GEORGE DBA STAR PAINTING CSLB LIC # 376058

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY BERLIND, CURTIS W AS TO DEFENDANT DANOPOULOS, GEORGE  CSLB LIC#376058 DANAPOULOS, GEORGE DBA STAR PAINTING CSLB LIC # 376058 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 - SERVED SEP-10-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DANAPOULOS, GEORGE DBA STAR PAINTING CSLB LIC # 376058

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERLIND, CURTIS W RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANOPOULOS, GEORGE  CSLB LIC#376058 DANAPOULOS, GEORGE DBA STAR PAINTING CSLB LIC # 376058 $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $285.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,285.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
